positive: A minimalist, highly detailed celestial forest scene composition, featuring stylized bioluminescent mushrooms and gentle, drifting nebula cloud shapes intertwined with the silhouettes of ancient, stylized trees. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo, sapphire blue, glowing teal, and metallic gold accents. Use a high-contrast, vector-art style with clean lines and smooth gradients, reminiscent of stained glass and woodcut engravings. The central composition must be perfectly framed for apparel printing. The overall mood should be mystical and tranquil. Cinematic studio lighting, clean deep background, no visible horizon line.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, poor anatomy, messy, low detail, grainy, realistic photo, photorealism
